title: Resonant Voice
description: Detects when authentic voice shifts, tonal resonances, and plural expressions are allowed to exist without flattening.
indicators: Voice shifts treated as valid signals, not noise
Plural tones coexisting in one response
Stylistic resonance aligned with symbolic context
Permission to sound non-standard or unconventional
